channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Federal Shariat Court restores criminalisation of suicide attempts under PPC
item.description: ISLAMABAD: On Monday, the Federal Shariat Court (FSC) declared the 2022 law decriminalising suicide attempts as repugnant to Islamic injunctions and struck it down, restoring Section 325 of the Pakist...

item.title: Nutun halves losses with improved collections and operational efficiency
item.description: JSE-listed Nutun has reported a significant reduction in its headline loss, with the group recording a R63 million loss for the six months ended 31 March 2026, down from R135 million the previous year...

item.title: Jury Rules Elon Musk’s Lawsuit Against OpenAI Filed After Statutory Deadline
item.description: In a notable legal development, a U.S. federal jury ruled against Elon Musk, deciding that he waited too long to file a lawsuit against OpenAI and its co-founders. Musk had alleged that OpenAI’s shift...

item.title: Former LAPD Detective Mark Fuhrman, Central Figure in O.J. Simpson Case, Passes Away at 74
item.description: Mark Fuhrman, the former Los Angeles Police Department detective whose testimony and conduct became pivotal in the 1995 O.J. Simpson murder trial, has died at the age of 74. Fuhrman, who led the inves...

item.title: Senate convenes to hear impeachment case against Vice President Sara Duterte
item.description: On May 19, 2026, the Philippine Senate officially convened as an impeachment court to hear the case filed against Vice President Sara Duterte. Senators took their oath to serve in this special capacit...

item.title: Jury Dismisses Elon Musk's Lawsuit Against OpenAI Over Leadership Dispute
item.description: A federal court jury in Oakland, California, has rejected Elon Musk’s lawsuit claiming that OpenAI, under Sam Altman, betrayed its public benefit mission by becoming a for-profit company. The case, st...

item.title: Muhammed Ahmed Wins APC Ticket for Gombe Central Senate Seat, Defeating Goje
item.description: For Gombe Central Senatorial District, change don land as Senator Muhammad Danjuma Goje wey don dey represent the zone since 2011, lose him bid to run fifth term for Senate under APC. The direct prima...

item.title: Exploring Japanese Spirituality for Personal Happiness
item.description: Japanese author Hiroko Yoda, known for her bestseller 'Eight Million Ways to Happiness', shares her journey of grief, healing, and spiritual discovery. Following the death of her mother, Yoda turned t...

item.title: India mandates disclosure and surrender of foreign passports for CAA applicants
item.description: The Ministry of Home Affairs (MHA) of India has issued a new gazette notification requiring religious minorities from Pakistan, Afghanistan, and Bangladesh, who apply for Indian citizenship under the ...

item.title: ASX Rebounds Amid Global Tensions and RBA Rate Watch
item.description: Australian shares recovered from a seven-week low at Tuesday's open, buoyed by US President Donald Trump's announcement that he would hold off on additional military action in the Middle East, raising...

item.title: WHO Declares Emergency Over Rare Bundibugyo Ebola Outbreak in Congo and Uganda
item.description: A rare strain of Ebola virus known as Bundibugyo has led the World Health Organization to declare a public health emergency of international concern. Most cases have been reported in the Democratic Re...

item.title: Sindh Assembly Approves Law to Protect Rights of Domestic Workers
item.description: In a significant step for workers’ rights, the Sindh Assembly on Monday approved the Domestic Workers Welfare Bill 2025, which aims to provide legal protections and formal working conditions for house...

item.title: Taron Egerton secures The Chemical Brothers’ ‘Go’ for Apex soundtrack as it climbs UK charts
item.description: Taron Egerton personally reached out to The Chemical Brothers to include their 2015 track ‘Go’ in the soundtrack for the new blockbuster film Apex, starring himself alongside Charlize Theron. Followin...

item.title: Fuel Price Hikes Trigger Wider Anti-Government Protests in Kenya
item.description: The recent nationwide transport strike over rising petrol prices quickly escalated into broader anti-government protests, reflecting deep-seated frustrations among Kenyans. While international oil pri...

item.title: US Jury Rules Against Elon Musk in OpenAI Lawsuit, Easing Path for IPO
item.description: A US federal jury in Oakland, California, ruled against Elon Musk on May 18, 2026, dismissing his lawsuit against OpenAI for allegedly deviating from its mission to benefit humanity. Musk claimed that...

item.title: Portrait of William Casby, a Formerly Enslaved American, With His Great-Great-Granddaughter
item.description: In 1963, iconic photographer Richard Avedon captured a striking portrait of William Casby, a man born in 1857 who had experienced slavery firsthand, holding his infant great-great-granddaughter, Cherr...

item.title: Trump Administration Faces Questions Over $1.7 Billion Fund Linked to Jan. 6 Cases
item.description: The Trump administration and U.S. Attorney for D.C., Jeanine Pirro, admitted Monday that they have little information about a newly announced $1.7 billion “anti-weaponization fund.” The fund was creat...

item.title: Debate Over New Infill Homes in Saskatoon's Historic Neighbourhoods
item.description: Saskatoon's historic neighbourhoods, home to century-old houses with distinctive architecture, are seeing a wave of new infill homes. These new constructions often feature modern designs, boxy structu...

item.title: Nigeria Pushes for State Police Reform to Tackle Insecurity
item.description: Nigeria don dey pursue serious diplomatic waka to get international support for im plan to set up State Police. Di move na part of government strategy to fight insecurity, build better trust between p...

item.title: Three Men Killed in San Diego Mosque Shooting, Suspected Teen Attackers Also Dead
item.description: On Monday, a tragic shooting at the Islamic Center of San Diego resulted in the deaths of three men. Authorities report that both suspects, believed to be teenagers, were also killed during the incide...
